sglang.title: Fix logprobs with logprob_start_len
sglang.author: comaniac
sglang.bodyExcerpt: When logprob_start_len > 0, the current implementation returns incorrect token logprobs, because we only computes logprobs of input_ids[logprob_start_len + 1 :]. This PR fixes this issue.

vllm.title: [FIX] Fix issue #2904
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Hi,
This PR fixes issue #2904 , allowing the YaRN models be workable again.

vllm.title: Remove Flash Attention in test env
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: To my understanding, we don't need flash_attn for our testing. Removing it from dependencies will resolve the occasional test failures due to flash_attn.

vllm.title: Include tokens from prompt phase in `counter_generation_tokens`
vllm.author: ronensc
vllm.bodyExcerpt: I noticed that the counter_generation_tokens metric was missing tokens generated during the prompt phase, only counting those from the autoregressive generation phase. This PR addresses that by incorporating tokens from both phases into the counter. Also, I've added a simple unit test to verify the

vllm.author: zhaoyang-star
